description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
Win-CodexBar 0.38.1 updates the Windows/Tauri release with the latest tray, Claude, provider parser, documentation, and repository cleanup fixes.

Highlights:
- Adds the tray-anchored flyout with resize, drag-reorder, zoom, and coexistence with Show Window.
- Fixes vertical taskbar popup placement and Claude OAuth refresh behavior.
- Fixes Claude cost over-counting and ports upstream 0.38.1 parser hardening for OpenAI API, OpenCode, and z.ai.
